title.rendered: Getting to Know You(Take the survey inside!)

content.rendered: My intent for this blog is to serve others. I want to help people attain life-changing experiences through local and global travel. I share my stories and thoughts related to travel, but I also want to know who is reading(YOU!). So, I’ve created a survey to get to know you all. I want to know where you’re from, what your dream trip is, how you like to travel, what your biggest travel worries are, and what you’d like from me as a blogger! I want to get to know you so that I can create better value for you here. So, whether you are a first time visitor or a frequent reader of my blog, please help me get to know you by filling out the survey below!
